source_text: The steering rack must be mechanically attached to the Chassis F.5.14 V.3.2.7 Joints between all components attaching the Steering Wheel to the steering rack must be mechanical and be visible at Technical Inspection
requirement_text_pred: Joints between all components attaching the Steering Wheel to the steering rack must be mechanical and be visible at Technical Inspection

prediction.subject: Joints between all components attaching the Steering Wheel to the steering rack

notes: Under ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148-style semantics, “at Technical Inspection” is better treated as a condition (more precisely: a verification context / lifecycle-event condition) rather than an object.
